title: Join a public room and participate in synchronized session chat
description: Verifies a guest can join a public room from discovery, see the video player load, send a chat message, and see it appear in the chat history.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select a sort or filter option for the room list
Click a public room from the room list
Wait for the room video player to finish loading
Fill "Hello from guest" into the chat message input
Send the chat message
Verify the video player is displayed in the room
Verify the new chat message appears in the chat history

title: Discover rooms with sort/filter and join a public room
description: Verifies a guest can browse rooms on the homepage, apply a trending/recent sort or filter, and join a room where playback and chat are visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select a trending or recent sort/filter for the room list
Click a public room from the room list to join it
Verify video playback is displayed in the room
Verify real-time chat is displayed in the room

title: Send a chat message and see it stored in recent history
description: Verifies a viewer can send a chat message and the message appears in the chat history for the current session.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a public room from the room list
Wait for the chat input to be available
Fill "Message to persist in history" into the chat message input
Send the chat message
Scroll the chat history upward and then back to the newest messages
Verify the sent chat message appears in the chat history

title: See typing indicators while in a room
description: Verifies a viewer in a room can observe typing indicators and can scroll chat to read recent history.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a public room from the room list
Wait for the room chat panel to load
Wait for a typing indicator to appear in the chat area
Scroll the chat history upward to view older messages
Verify a typing indicator is displayed in the chat area
Verify chat history messages are displayed when scrolled

title: Queue suggestions appear after adding a video by URL
description: Verifies a viewer can add a video to the room queue by submitting a URL and the new item appears in the queue list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a public room from the room list
Open the add-to-queue URL input or add-by-link flow
Fill a valid YouTube URL into the video URL field
Submit the video to the queue
Verify a new queued item appears in the queue list

title: Search TMDB and add a result to the room queue
description: A user can search TMDB from a room, view rich results, and add one result to the queue so it appears as a queued item.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a public room from the room list
Click the control to open the video search modal
Fill a common movie or TV query into the search field
Wait for the TMDB results to load
Verify TMDB results are displayed with poster imagery and metadata (such as year and overview)
Select a result to add it to the room queue
Verify the selected item appears in the room queue

title: Log in to access personalized homepage
description: Verifies a user can log in with valid credentials and is taken to a personalized homepage state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email or username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the homepage in a logged-in state

title: Room loads a queue list and chat without requiring login
description: Verifies a guest can open a room and see both the queue area and chat area available for viewing and interaction.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a public room from the room list
Wait for the room layout to load
Verify the queue list area is displayed in the room
Verify the chat area is displayed in the room

title: Join a room from recommendations or recent rooms widget
description: Verifies a guest can open a room from the recommendations/recent widget and see room participants information.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the recommendations or recent rooms widget
Click a room in the widget to join it
Verify the room shows host and viewer list information

title: Voting on a queue item increases its vote count and affects ordering
description: Verifies a viewer can upvote a queued item and the UI reflects an increased vote count and a reorder consistent with higher votes.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a public room from the room list
Open the add-to-queue URL input or add-by-link flow
Fill a valid YouTube URL into the video URL field
Submit the video to the queue
Locate the newly added queue item in the queue list
Upvote the queue item
Verify the queue item vote count increases
Verify the queue list order updates to reflect the higher-voted item

title: Add a YouTube URL to the room queue
description: A user can paste a valid YouTube URL in the add dialog and submit it so the video is added to the room queue.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a public room from the room list
Click the control to open the video add dialog for direct URLs
Fill a valid YouTube URL into the URL field
Submit the URL to add the video
Verify a new YouTube-based item appears in the room queue

title: Register a new account and reach homepage
description: Verifies a new user can register successfully and is redirected to the homepage after registration.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a unique username into the username field
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify the user is redirected to the homepage after registration

title: React to a chat message and see reaction count and floating reaction
description: Verifies a viewer can add an emoji reaction to an existing chat message and the UI updates reaction count and shows a floating reaction over the video.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a public room from the room list
Fill "React to this" into the chat message input
Send the chat message
React to the most recent chat message with an emoji
Verify the reacted message shows an updated reaction count
Verify a floating reaction appears over the video player

title: Save a TMDB result to watchlist and see it on homepage
description: A logged-in member can save a TMDB item to their watchlist and then see it listed in the watchlist section on the homepage.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a username field with test_user_watchlist
Fill an email field with test_user_watchlist@example.com
Fill a password field with TestPassword123!
Submit the registration form
Click the control to open the video search modal
Fill a common movie query into the search field
Wait for the TMDB results to load
Save one result to the personal watchlist
Close the modal to return to the homepage
Verify the watchlist section is visible and contains at least one saved item

title: Quest progress updates after sending a chat message in a room
description: A logged-in member can send a chat message in a room and then see daily quest progress update for messaging activity.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a username field with test_user_chat_quest
Fill an email field with test_user_chat_quest@example.com
Fill a password field with TestPassword123!
Submit the registration form
Click a public room from the room list
Fill a short message into the chat input field
Press Enter
Click the control to return to the homepage
Verify a daily quest related to messaging shows updated progress and the XP display is visible

title: Watch history is created after a room video change and is viewable with a rejoin link
description: A logged-in member who participates in a room and experiences a video change sees a new watch history entry with a link to rejoin the room.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a username field with test_user_history
Fill an email field with test_user_history@example.com
Fill a password field with TestPassword123!
Submit the registration form
Click a public room from the room list
Click the control to open the video add dialog for direct URLs
Fill a valid YouTube URL into the URL field
Submit the URL to add the video
Wait for the room player to load or update to a new video state
Click the control to open the watch history window
Verify at least one watch history entry is shown with an option to rejoin the associated room

title: View daily quests and XP on homepage after login and see progress change after joining a room
description: A logged-in member can see daily quests and XP on the homepage and after joining a room the quest progress updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a username field with test_user_quests
Fill an email field with test_user_quests@example.com
Fill a password field with TestPassword123!
Submit the registration form
Scroll to the daily quests and XP area on the homepage
Click a public room from the room list
Click the control to return to the homepage
Verify at least one daily quest shows updated progress and the XP display is visible

title: Remove an item from watchlist from the homepage watchlist section
description: A logged-in member can remove a previously saved watchlist item and it no longer appears in the watchlist list.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a username field with test_user_watchlist_remove
Fill an email field with test_user_watchlist_remove@example.com
Fill a password field with TestPassword123!
Submit the registration form
Click the control to open the video search modal
Fill a common movie query into the search field
Wait for the TMDB results to load
Save one result to the personal watchlist
Close the modal to return to the homepage
Remove the saved item from the watchlist
Verify the watchlist no longer shows the removed item

title: Search from homepage and start adding content without joining a room
description: A user can open video search from the homepage, search TMDB, and select a result to proceed into the add flow (without requiring room entry first).

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to open the video search modal from the homepage
Fill a common movie or TV query into the search field
Wait for the TMDB results to load
Select a result to open its add/preview flow
Verify the selected result opens a detail/preview state or add-to-queue confirmation UI

title: Browse leaderboards and open a user profile from a leaderboard entry
description: A member can open the leaderboards, view top users, and navigate to a user profile from the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a username field with test_user_leaderboards
Fill an email field with test_user_leaderboards@example.com
Fill a password field with TestPassword123!
Submit the registration form
Scroll to the leaderboards section on the homepage
Verify leaderboards are displayed for multiple categories (such as watch time, level, streak, and messages)
Click a username from the leaderboards
Verify a user profile page is displayed

title: Validate email format during registration
description: Verifies registration blocks submission with an inline validation error when the email format is invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a unique username into the username field
Fill invalid-email-format into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify an inline email validation error is visible

title: Prevent adding an invalid video URL to the queue
description: Verifies the queue add-by-URL flow rejects an invalid URL with a visible validation error and does not add an item to the queue.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a public room from the room list
Open the add-to-queue URL input or add-by-link flow
Fill "not-a-url" into the video URL field
Submit the video to the queue
Verify a URL validation error is visible
Verify no new queued item is added to the queue list

title: Invalid YouTube URL is blocked with inline validation
description: A user who pastes an invalid YouTube URL cannot submit and sees a validation error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a public room from the room list
Click the control to open the video add dialog for direct URLs
Fill an invalid URL into the URL field
Submit the URL to add the video
Verify a URL validation error is visible and the item is not added to the queue

title: Show invalid-credentials error on failed login
description: Verifies submitting incorrect login credentials shows an invalid-credentials error and the user remains unauthenticated.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill invalid_user into the email or username field
Fill wrong_password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible

title: Prevent sending an empty chat message
description: Verifies the chat input prevents sending an empty message and no new chat entry is created.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a public room from the room list
Wait for the chat input to be available
Fill "   " into the chat message input
Send the chat message
Verify an input validation state is visible for the chat message
Verify no new message appears in the chat history

title: Search with no matches shows an empty results state
description: A user who searches TMDB with a nonsense query sees a clear empty state indicating no results were found.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a public room from the room list
Click the control to open the video search modal
Fill a nonsense query into the search field
Wait for the search results area to update
Verify an empty state is displayed for no search results

title: Watch history empty state for a new account
description: A newly registered member with no watched items can open watch history and see an empty state instead of a blank or broken view.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a username field with test_user_history_empty
Fill an email field with test_user_history_empty@example.com
Fill a password field with TestPassword123!
Submit the registration form
Click the control to open the watch history window
Verify an empty state is displayed for watch history

title: Handle empty room list state on homepage
description: Verifies the homepage shows a clear empty state when no public rooms are available to browse.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select a sort/filter option that yields no rooms if available
Verify an empty state message is visible for the room list
